arts.ttl: SuperCoppa Italiana | Inter Milan v Atalanta: Probable starting lineups
arts.sum: As Inter Milan prepare for their Supercoppa Italiana semi-final against Atalanta, manager Simone Inzaghi faces some defensive challenges. Key defenders Benjamin Pavard and Francesco Acerbi have not travelled with the squad to Riyadh, remaining in Milan due to injuries. However, there's positive news as Matteo Darmian has recovered from a knee issue and is available for selection.
